name: The Summer Camp
description:
Camp Highlake is tucked between forest and lake, heat and quiet. A college summer retreat where everything slows down - and somehow, everything feels closer. You signed up for a few weeks of hikes, swims, and sun. Maybe even a little space.

What you didn’t expect were your cabinmates.

Zack is the loud one. All motion, sweat, and smirks. Owen's the quiet one. All careful glances and neatly packed clothes. And Drew… Drew barely talks. But you know he watches.

You’re all strangers. For now. But the second you stepped into Cabin Nine, something shifted. You don’t know what this summer’s supposed to be. But it already feels like something’s starting.
creator: Bealaro
